---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for QuestOps Watchdog
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem would this feature solve? What is the current limitation?

## Proposed solution

Describe the feature you'd like. Be specific about behavior, configuration, and output.

## Game / server type

Which game server(s) would this apply to? (e.g. Project Zomboid, Minecraft, Valheim, etc.)

## Why it matters

How would this improve your monitoring workflow or server reliability?

## Alternatives considered

What workarounds have you tried? Are there other tools that solve this?

## Scope preference

- [ ] I'd be happy with a basic implementation
- [ ] I'd like a polished, production-ready feature
- [ ] I'd be willing to help test
- [ ] I'd be willing to contribute code
